name: imc-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for the ACM Internet Measurement Conference (IMC): routing empirical network-measurement work into IMC versus SIGCOMM/NSDI/CoNEXT/PAM, the two-deadline-per-year cycle with the One-Shot-Revision round, double-blind acmart HotCRP submission, measurement ethics and responsible disclosure, vantage-point and dataset methodology, the artifact-availability declaration and Replicability Track, and the Community Contribution Award. Grounded in the IMC 2026 call, submission instructions, committees page, SIGCOMM/IMC pages, ACM DL, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
